news.t: Checking the Style Box: Fidelity's Systematic ‘Beta-Plus' Lineup
ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
Fidelity Expands Enhanced Suite With Mid- & Small-Cap ETFs
Fidelity Investments® Builds out Active Enhanced ETF Suite With the Launch of Four Small, Mid Cap ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FSEG is an equity ETF with a total of 344 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 3.93%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 2.28%, Fabrinet at 1.39%, Guardant Health at 1.36%, and Sterling Infrastructure at 1.32%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Small Cap Growth ETF (FSEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US small-cap companies exhibiting growth characteristics, selected from the Russell 2000 Growth Index. FSEG was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
